text: Amidst the repeated chant and the cool-toned, futuristic room, I feel an uneasy curiosity. There is a sense of being somewhere between order and chaos, as if the structured display and glowing technology are both inviting and unsettling. The sterile atmosphere heightens my vigilance, while the words and displays prompt reflection about humanity’s relationship to technology—and the hint of existential disquiet in the repetition outside.
